headline: Norfolk Southern earnings slip as winter weather impacts rail volume
summary: Norfolk Southern said first-quarter earnings were slightly lower as winter weather woes and higher fuel prices hurt freight volumes. The post Norfolk Southern earnings slip as winter weather impacts rail volume appeared first on FreightWaves.
